message.content:
@startuml
participant "Invoker" as Invoker
participant "Command" as Command
participant "ConcreteCommand" as ConcreteCommand
participant "Client" as Client
participant "Receiver" as Receiver

Invoker -> Command : 调用命令对象的execute()
Invoker -> Command : 并在某刻调用execute()

Command -> Receiver : 让接收者进行动作

Client -> ConcreteCommand : 创建一个ConcreteCommand
Client -> Receiver : 设置其接受者

ConcreteCommand -> Receiver : 定义动作和接收者之间的绑定关系
ConcreteCommand : execute()
ConcreteCommand : undo()

Receiver : action()

note right of Invoker
调用者持有命令对象，
并在某刻调用execute()
end note

note above of Command
调用命令对象的execute()
就可以让接收者进行动作
end note

note right of Client
这个客户负责创建一个ConcreteCommand，
并设置其接受者
end note

note right of ConcreteCommand
定义了动作和接收者之间的绑定关系，
调用者只需要调用execute()就可以发出请求
end note

note right of Receiver
接收者知道如何实现这个请求
end note

@enduml
